14 Days From SNF/TCU This field indicates the patient was discharged from skilled nursing facility (SNF / TCU) during the past 14 days. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x x
M1000_DC_NON_14_DA M1000 (M0175) Discharged Past 14 Days - NA This field indicates the patient was not discharged from an inpatient facility during the past 14 days. 0 = Not Checked (Not NA), 1 = Checked (NA) CHAR 1 x x x x x x
M1005_DSCHG_UK M1005 (M0180) Most Recent Inpat Discharge Date- UK This field
